description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a widescreen display, featuring a black, matte-finished bezel that frames the screen. The front view shows a Windows operating system interface, indicating the monitor is powered on and functional. The bezel is relatively thin and uniform, with a subtle brand logo centered on the bottom edge. The monitor is supported by a rectangular, flat pedestal stand that appears sturdy and stable, made of black plastic or metal. The rear of the monitor is plain, with no visible ports or buttons, and the side views highlight the monitor's slim profile. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for office or home environments.
description: A slim, widescreen computer monitor with a thin black bezel and a flat rectangular pedestal stand. The front displays a powered-on Windows interface, and the design is modern and minimalistic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the active display with a Windows interface, thin black bezel, and centered brand logo on the bottom bezel.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the monitor's slim thickness and the flat, rectangular base of the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel with no visible ports or buttons, and the full width of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the monitor's thinness and the shape of the stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and matte black, with straight edges and slightly rounded corners. It is uniform in thickness and features a subtle, centered brand logo at the bottom.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a flat, rectangular pedestal base made of black material, providing stable support without visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single power button is implied at the bottom right of the front bezel, but no other buttons are visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, white brand logo is visible at the center of the bottom bezel on the front of the monitor.
